name: Nonprofit Lottery Tax Exclusion

eligibility.description: Must be an organization exempt from tax under section 501 or 521 and ensure net proceeds are used solely for the organization's exempt purposes.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes drawings conducted by 501 or 521 exempt organizations from the definition of a taxable 'lottery' provided no proceeds inure to private individuals.
